// Generated by FrontComposer source generator (Story 2-2 Task 4)
// Do not edit directly

#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable ASP0006

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Fluxor;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Communication;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Rendering;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web;
using Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using Microsoft.JSInterop;

namespace Demo.Domain;

/// <summary>Auto-generated density-driven renderer for <see cref="DemoCommand"/> (Story 2-2).</summary>
public partial class DemoCommandRenderer : ComponentBase, IInlinePopover
{
    [Parameter] public CommandRenderMode? RenderMode { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public Demo.Domain.DemoCommand? InitialValue { get; set; }
    // Story 2-2 code-review D11 — CompactInline collapse callback (AC9 Escape focus-return). Story 2-5 adds NavigateAwayRequested.
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnCollapseRequested { get; set; }
    [CascadingParameter] public ProjectionContext? ProjectionContext { get; set; }

    [Inject] private IEnumerable<IDerivedValueProvider> DerivedValueProviders { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private IOptions<FcShellOptions> ShellOptions { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private IJSRuntime JSRuntime { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private InlinePopoverRegistry InlinePopoverRegistry { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private NavigationManager NavigationManager { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private ILogger<DemoCommandRenderer>? Logger { get; set; }
    [Inject] private ICommandPageContext PageContext { get; set; } = default!;
    [Inject] private IState<Demo.Domain.DemoCommandLifecycleState> _lifecycleState { get; set; } = default!;

    private CommandRenderMode _effectiveMode;
    private bool _popoverOpen;
    private ElementReference _compactCardRef;
    private readonly string _triggerButtonId = "fc-trigger-Demo-Domain-DemoCommand";
    private Action? _externalSubmit;
    private IJSObjectReference? _expandInRowModule;
    private Demo.Domain.DemoCommand _prefilledModel = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _effectiveMode = RenderMode ?? CommandRenderMode.Inline;
        if (RenderMode.HasValue && !IsCompatibleOverride(RenderMode.Value))
        {
            Logger?.LogWarning("HFC1015: RenderMode {Mode} incompatible with DemoCommand density Inline", _effectiveMode);
        }
        Logger?.LogInformation("Rendering {CommandType} in {Mode} (density=Inline)", "Demo.Domain.DemoCommand", _effectiveMode);
        _prefilledModel = InitialValue ?? new();
        await PrefillDerivableFieldsAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
    }

    private static bool IsCompatibleOverride(CommandRenderMode mode)
        => mode != CommandRenderMode.Inline || true;

    private async Task PrefillDerivableFieldsAsync()
    {
        await TryPrefillPropertyAsync("MessageId").ConfigureAwait(false);
        await TryPrefillPropertyAsync("TenantId").ConfigureAwait(false);
    }

    private Task RefreshDerivedValuesBeforeSubmitAsync()
        => PrefillDerivableFieldsAsync();

    private async Task TryPrefillPropertyAsync(string propertyName)
    {
        bool anyProviderResolved = false;
        foreach (IDerivedValueProvider provider in DerivedValueProviders)
        {
            DerivedValueResult result = await provider.ResolveAsync(typeof(Demo.Domain.DemoCommand), propertyName, ProjectionContext, default).ConfigureAwait(false);
            if (!result.HasValue)
            {
                continue;
            }

            anyProviderResolved = true;
            if (TrySetPropertyValue(propertyName, result.Value))
            {
                return;
            }

            Logger?.LogWarning("Derived value for {PropertyName} on {CommandType} could not be assigned.", propertyName, "Demo.Domain.DemoCommand");
        }

        if (!anyProviderResolved)
        {
            Logger?.LogDebug("No derived value could be resolved for {PropertyName} on {CommandType}; leaving default value in place.", propertyName, "Demo.Domain.DemoCommand");
        }
    }

    private bool TrySetPropertyValue(string propertyName, object? value)
    {
        System.Reflection.PropertyInfo? property = typeof(Demo.Domain.DemoCommand).GetProperty(propertyName, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
        if (property is null || !property.CanWrite)
        {
            return false;
        }

        if (value is null)
        {
            property.SetValue(_prefilledModel, null);
            return true;
        }

        Type targetType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(property.PropertyType) ?? property.PropertyType;
        object? converted = value;
        if (!targetType.IsInstanceOfType(value))
        {
            try
            {
                if (targetType.IsEnum)
                {
                    converted = value is string s
                        ? Enum.Parse(targetType, s, ignoreCase: true)
                        : Enum.ToObject(targetType, value);
                }
                else if (targetType == typeof(Guid))
                {
                    converted = value is Guid guid ? guid : Guid.Parse(Convert.ToString(value, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)!);
                }
                else if (targetType == typeof(DateTimeOffset))
                {
                    converted = value is DateTimeOffset dto
                        ? dto
                        : DateTimeOffset.Parse(Convert.ToString(value, CultureInfo.CurrentCulture)!, CultureInfo.CurrentCulture);
                }
                else
                {
                    converted = Convert.ChangeType(value, targetType, CultureInfo.CurrentCulture);
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex) when (ex is InvalidCastException or FormatException or OverflowException or ArgumentException)
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        property.SetValue(_prefilledModel, converted);
        return true;
    }

    private Icon? ResolveIcon()
    {
        return TryResolveIcon("Regular.Size16.Play", out Icon? fallback) ? fallback : null;
    }

    private static bool TryResolveIcon(string iconName, out Icon? icon)
    {
        icon = null;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(iconName))
        {
            return false;
        }

        // FluentUI v5 icon classes are nested under the `Icons` static class and live in
        // per-variant satellite assemblies (Icons.Regular, Icons.Filled, Icons.Light, Icons.Color).
        // The icon-name format is `Variant.SizeNN.Name`, so the variant prefix selects the assembly.
        try
        {
            int firstDot = iconName.IndexOf('.');
            string variant = firstDot > 0 ? iconName.Substring(0, firstDot) : iconName;
            string assemblyName = "Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.Icons." + variant;
            string typeName = "Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.Icons+" + iconName.Replace('.', '+') + ", " + assemblyName;
            Type? type = Type.GetType(typeName, throwOnError: false);
            if (type is null)
            {
                return false;
            }

            icon = Activator.CreateInstance(type) as Icon;
            return icon is not null;
        }
        catch
        {
            icon = null;
            return false;
        }
    }

    private void OnFormRegisteredExternalSubmit(Action submit)
    {
        _externalSubmit = submit;
        _ = InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    private Task OnZeroFieldClickAsync()
    {
        _externalSubmit?.Invoke();
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private async Task OpenPopoverAsync()
    {
        await InlinePopoverRegistry.OpenAsync(this).ConfigureAwait(false);
        _popoverOpen = true;
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged).ConfigureAwait(false);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public async Task ClosePopoverAsync()
    {
        if (!_popoverOpen) return;
        _popoverOpen = false;
        InlinePopoverRegistry.Released(this);
        try
        {
            _expandInRowModule ??= await JSRuntime.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./_content/Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell/js/fc-expandinrow.js").ConfigureAwait(false);
            await _expandInRowModule.InvokeVoidAsync("focusTriggerElementById", _triggerButtonId).ConfigureAwait(false);
        }
        catch (InvalidOperationException) { /* prerender or unavailable JS runtime. */ }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown; benign. */ }
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged).ConfigureAwait(false);
    }

    private Task HandleEscape(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        return e.Key == "Escape" && _popoverOpen ? ClosePopoverAsync() : Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    // Story 2-2 code-review D11 — CompactInline Escape → OnCollapseRequested (AC9 focus-return contract).
    private async Task HandleCompactEscapeAsync(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Escape" && _effectiveMode == CommandRenderMode.CompactInline && OnCollapseRequested.HasDelegate)
        {
            await OnCollapseRequested.InvokeAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
        }
    }

    private Task OnConfirmedAsync()
    {
        if (_effectiveMode == CommandRenderMode.Inline && _popoverOpen)
        {
            return ClosePopoverAsync();
        }
        if (_effectiveMode == CommandRenderMode.FullPage)
        {
            NavigateToReturnPath();
        }
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private void NavigateToReturnPath()
    {
        string? path = GetRawReturnPath();
        if (IsValidRelativeReturnPath(path))
        {
            NavigationManager.NavigateTo(path!);
            return;
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(path))
        {
            Logger?.LogError("D32: ReturnPath '{Path}' rejected as invalid-relative; navigating home. CorrelationId={CorrelationId}", path, ResolveLoggingCorrelationId());
        }
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo("/");
    }

    private static bool IsValidRelativeReturnPath(string? path)
        => Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ReturnPathValidator.IsSafeRelativePath(path);

    private string? GetRawReturnPath()
        => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(PageContext.ReturnPath) ? PageContext.ReturnPath : GetQueryParameter("returnPath");

    private string? GetQueryParameter(string key)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key))
        {
            return null;
        }

        Uri uri = NavigationManager.ToAbsoluteUri(NavigationManager.Uri);
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(uri.Query))
        {
            return null;
        }

        foreach (string pair in uri.Query.TrimStart('?').Split('&', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries))
        {
            string[] segments = pair.Split('=', 2);
            string currentKey = Uri.UnescapeDataString(segments[0]);
            if (!string.Equals(currentKey, key, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                continue;
            }

            return segments.Length > 1 ? Uri.UnescapeDataString(segments[1]) : string.Empty;
        }

        return null;
    }

    private string GetBreadcrumbReturnPath()
        => IsValidRelativeReturnPath(GetRawReturnPath()) ? GetRawReturnPath()! : "/";

    private string GetBreadcrumbBoundedContext()
        => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(PageContext.BoundedContext) ? PageContext.BoundedContext : "Demo";

    private string? ResolveLoggingCorrelationId()
        => _lifecycleState.Value.CorrelationId;

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender && _effectiveMode == CommandRenderMode.CompactInline)
        {
            try
            {
                _expandInRowModule ??= await JSRuntime.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./_content/Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell/js/fc-expandinrow.js").ConfigureAwait(false);
                await _expandInRowModule.InvokeVoidAsync("initializeExpandInRow", _compactCardRef).ConfigureAwait(false);
            }
            catch (InvalidOperationException) { /* prerender: JSInterop not yet available. */ }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown; benign. */ }
        }
    }

    protected override void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)
    {
        int seq = 0;
        switch (_effectiveMode)
        {
            case CommandRenderMode.Inline:
            {
                builder.OpenComponent<FluentButton>(seq++);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Id", _triggerButtonId);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Type", ButtonType.Button);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Appearance", ButtonAppearance.Outline);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "IconStart", ResolveIcon());
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Label", "Demo");
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OnClick", EventCallback.Factory.Create<MouseEventArgs>(this, _ => OpenPopoverAsync()));
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "aria-expanded", _popoverOpen);
                builder.CloseComponent();

                builder.OpenComponent<FluentPopover>(seq++);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "AnchorId", _triggerButtonId);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Opened", _popoverOpen);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OpenedChanged", EventCallback.Factory.Create<bool>(this, value => _popoverOpen = value));
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)(__popover =>
                {
                    int pseq = 0;
                    __popover.OpenElement(pseq++, "div");
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "class", "fc-popover");
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "onkeydown", EventCallback.Factory.Create<KeyboardEventArgs>(this, HandleEscape));
                    __popover.OpenComponent<Demo.Domain.DemoCommandForm>(pseq++);
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "InitialValue", _prefilledModel);
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "ShowFieldsOnly", new[] { "Field0" });
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "BeforeSubmit", (Func<Task>)RefreshDerivedValuesBeforeSubmitAsync);
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "OnConfirmed", EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, OnConfirmedAsync));
                    __popover.CloseComponent();
                    __popover.OpenComponent<FluentButton>(pseq++);
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "Type", ButtonType.Button);
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "Appearance", ButtonAppearance.Outline);
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "Label", "Cancel");
                    __popover.AddAttribute(pseq++, "OnClick", EventCallback.Factory.Create<MouseEventArgs>(this, _ => ClosePopoverAsync()));
                    __popover.CloseComponent();
                    __popover.CloseElement();
                }));
                builder.CloseComponent();
                break;
            }
            case CommandRenderMode.CompactInline:
            {
                builder.OpenElement(seq++, "div");
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "class", "fc-expand-in-row");
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "onkeydown", EventCallback.Factory.Create<KeyboardEventArgs>(this, HandleCompactEscapeAsync));
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "tabindex", "-1");
                builder.AddElementReferenceCapture(seq++, r => _compactCardRef = r);
                builder.OpenComponent<FluentCard>(seq++);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Appearance", CardAppearance.Outline);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Shadow", CardShadow.Small);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)(__card =>
                {
                    int cseq = 0;
                    __card.OpenComponent<Demo.Domain.DemoCommandForm>(cseq++);
                    __card.AddAttribute(cseq++, "InitialValue", _prefilledModel);
                    __card.AddAttribute(cseq++, "DerivableFieldsHidden", true);
                    __card.AddAttribute(cseq++, "BeforeSubmit", (Func<Task>)RefreshDerivedValuesBeforeSubmitAsync);
                    __card.AddAttribute(cseq++, "OnConfirmed", EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, OnConfirmedAsync));
                    __card.CloseComponent();
                }));
                builder.CloseComponent();
                builder.CloseElement();
                break;
            }
            case CommandRenderMode.FullPage:
            default:
            {
                var opts = ShellOptions.Value;
                builder.OpenElement(seq++, "div");
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "style", $"max-width: {opts.FullPageFormMaxWidth}; margin: 0 auto;");
                if (opts.EmbeddedBreadcrumb)
                {
                    builder.OpenElement(seq++, "nav");
                    builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "aria-label", "breadcrumb");
                    builder.OpenComponent<FluentLink>(seq++);
                    builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Href", GetBreadcrumbReturnPath());
                    builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Appearance", LinkAppearance.Subtle);
                    builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)(__link =>
                    {
                        __link.AddContent(0, GetBreadcrumbBoundedContext());
                    }));
                    builder.CloseComponent();
                    builder.AddContent(seq++, " > Demo");
                    builder.CloseElement();
                }
                builder.OpenComponent<Demo.Domain.DemoCommandForm>(seq++);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "InitialValue", _prefilledModel);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "BeforeSubmit", (Func<Task>)RefreshDerivedValuesBeforeSubmitAsync);
                builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OnConfirmed", EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, OnConfirmedAsync));
                builder.CloseComponent();
                builder.CloseElement();
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

#pragma warning restore ASP0006
